(Top)
Goals

Artificial intelligence

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Artificial intelligence (AI), in its broadest sense, is intelligence exhibited by machines, particularly computer systems. It is a field of research in computer science that develops and studies methods and software that enable machines to perceive their environment...

<div class="navbox">Categories: Artificial intelligence</div>

1. Select source2. Clean and structure3. Copy result
See full flow

From noisy page to useful prompt in seconds

The flow is intentionally simple so you can stay in your research or coding context.

Select your source

Use the extension button or keyboard shortcut on any page.

Clean in one pass

PromptReady strips clutter and keeps structure that LLMs can parse.

Paste with confidence

Get citation-ready Markdown instantly in your clipboard.

Stop spending time fixing text before you can think.

PromptReady removes cleanup work so you can focus on the actual question you want to solve.

No card required. Installs in under 30 seconds.

Built for people who
prompt all day

Everything here exists to reduce friction between source material and high-quality model responses.

Structure-preserving cleanup

Keeps headings, lists, and tables intact so models parse your context correctly.

One-click extraction

No manual selection dance. Run from toolbar or shortcut and copy instantly.

Citation metadata

Every export can include source URL and capture timestamp for verification.

Local-first by default

Core parsing happens on-device. Your browsing context stays private.

Built for any content

Understands Wikipedia, news articles, long-form essays, docs, and forum threads.

Configurable output

Toggle title, source footer, spacing, and formatting to fit your workflow.

Trusted by builders, researchers,
and operators

Teams use PromptReady when they need reliable context and consistent outputs.

while in beta
